name: Red Sequin Off-Shoulder Sendoff Gown
nameSwahili: Gauni la Kupeleka la Sequins Nyekundu
description: Statement red sequin off-shoulder sendoff gown with fitted mermaid silhouette and sweeping train. Fully beaded bodice with sparkling sequin overlay catches light from every angle — perfect for the send-off entrance that everyone remembers. Pairs with matching bridesmaids' palette or stands alone as the bride's reception show-stopper.
descriptionSwahili: Gauni la kupeleka la rangi nyekundu lililofunikwa kwa sequins linalometa — chaguo kamili kwa siku ya kupelekwa.
